name: Curried Eel (Aal i Karry)
recipeInstructions: One large eel or two small ones are suitable for 4 people. Remove the skin, cut into pieces about the size of a finger, and place in boiling salt water with a sprig of parsley. Use enough water to cover only half the fish so that the stock remains strong. Cook until tender and keep warm while preparing the sauce. Melt butter in a pot, brown the onion, add flour and curry. Gradually incorporate the fish stock until the sauce reaches the desired thickness. Taste and adjust seasoning with more curry if needed. Pour over the eel, serve on a platter with fluffy steamed rice.
